The Easiest Way to Create 3D Models

Meet the world's most popular and intuitive free AI 3D model generator. Transform text and images into stunning 3D models in seconds with our text & image to 3D model tool—no experience required!

3D Content Creation Democratized

Empower anyone to create production-ready 3D assets from a simple text prompt or reference images in seconds, no need for learning specialized modeling skills

10x Faster Than Traditional Methods

Reduce hours or days of manual modeling and texturing to mere minutes, lightning fast generation speed saves you time in the development cycle and ensures your projects stay on schedule

Scale Creation without Scaling Costs

Create thousands of assets simultaneously at a fraction of traditional costs, cutting expenses for scaled 3D content creation by up to 100x
Trusted by partners and customers across industries to build the future of 3D creation
G2 Rating: 4.8TrustPilot Rating: 4.8

How It Works

  1. Input

    Upload a clear image or type a short text prompt, no 3D skills required.

  2. Generate

    Watch it become a high-quality 3D model aligned to your input in moments.

  3. Download

    Preview your model in the browser, then download for your workflow.
Creation Speed

Instant 3D Model Creation in Seconds

Meshy turbocharges every phase of 3D asset creation, slashing turnaround times from days to minutes. From prompt to model, our integrated AI-powered tools let you iterate, generate, and refine with unmatched efficiency.

Image to 3D Model

Turn your 2D images, sketch or illustrations effortlessly into stunning 3D models with our image to 3D model tool. Perfect for creators looking to bring their images to life.

3D to Video

Bring 3D models and scenes to life with our AI video generator. Our 3D to Video feature ensures consistent results and gives you full control over every shot.

Text to 3D Model

Create detailed 3D models from your ideas using our Text to 3D Model tool, which generates accurate 3D models from simple text descriptions.

AI Texturing

Enhance your 3D models—generated or uploaded—using text prompts or reference images with our AI texture generator, crafting textures in any style you want.

Smart Remesh

Instantly adjust triangle or quad counts, switch topology types, and balance detail and performance on export with options from 1k to 300k.

Rigging and Animation

Easily rig your characters with automatic rigging, and prepare them for animation and industry-standard workflows.

Multiple Concurrent Tasks

Accelerate your workflow with bulk generation—Meshy can handle 50+ 3D model and texture tasks at once.

Multilingual Support

Besides English, Meshy supports prompts in multiple languages—type in Spanish, French, Chinese, Japanese, and more to create with ease.

Animation Library

Meshy’s animation library offers 500+ game-ready motions—from basic walks and jumps to complex shooting stances, fights, and dance moves.
Creative Flexibility

Unlock Limitless Creative Freedom

Unlock limitless creativity with Meshy—craft props, characters, and environments in any style, from photorealistic to cartoon or sci-fi, all on your terms.

AI Prompt Helper

The built-in AI prompt helper transforms vague ideas into clear, detailed prompts—so you get the 3D model you envisioned, every time.

PBR Maps Support

Meshy supports PBR textures—Diffuse, Roughness, Metallic, and Normal maps—export-ready for Unreal, Unity, Blender, Maya, and WebGL.

Versatile Texture Styles

Create in any style, from realistic and cartoon to hand painted and fantasy, with Meshy's broad range of texture options at your command.

Limitless Asset Types

You can generate an endless variety of assets including characters, props, environments, and functional models like phone holders—your imagination sets the limit.

Vibrant Community

Meshy’s community of over 3 million creators shares, downloads, and remixes models. You can find collaboration, inspiration, and creative growth at Meshy community.
Fine-tuned Control

Total Creative Authority and Control

Meshy puts you in control—guide generation with input settings, iterate on results, and fine-tune details until the asset aligns with your vision.

Text to Image

Generate captivating images from text prompts using our Text to Single or Multiple Image tool, making it easy to visualize your concepts.

Multi-view Image to 3D

Generate front, side, and back view images of your concept, then turn them into a high-fidelity 3D model that matches your vision.

Free Retry

With the same prompt, you can re-generate models for free, so you achieve the result you want.

AI Texture Editing

Create unlimited textures on the same mesh and refine colors, patterns, or materials simply by adjusting your prompts.
Production Readiness

Ready for Professional Production, Instantly

Meshy offers built-in post-processing to meet poly budgets, fix mesh issues, and export in industry-standard formats—no additional tools required.

Asset Management

Browse, preview, and manage your generated assets in one place. Label, search, and bulk download past assets anytime, so you spend less time digging and more time creating.

Private Licensed

Meshy offers a private license that lets you commercialize your generated models while protecting them from unauthorized use or sharing.

Multiple 3D File Formats Support

Export model in FBX, GLB, OBJ, STL, 3MF, USDZ, BLEND formats for production use—no extra conversion needed.

Resize and Pivot Tool

Set accurate real-world dimensions and pivot points for perfect in-scene alignment or 3D-print readiness.
Workflow Integration

Seamless Integration with Your 3D Pipeline

Meshy’s plugins and API provide a frictionless bridge between asset creation and your preferred tools, ensuring efficiency from ideation to in-engine deployment.

API Platform

Tap directly into Meshy’s generation power via a robust, well-documented REST API—create tasks, manage balance, and weave 3D creation into any pipeline or language with just a few lines of code.

3D Platform Plugins

Meshy integrates directly into your game engine and 3D pipeline with native plugins—import generated assets seamlessly into Blender, Unity, 3ds Max, Maya, Godot, Unreal Engine, and 3D printing softwares including Bambu Studio, OrcaSlicer, Creality Print, Elegoo Slicer, Ultimaker Cura, and Lychee Slicer.
Enterprise-Grade Controls

Enterprise-grade Controls and Administration

Meshy empowers organizations with robust tools for secure access, data privacy, collaboration, and governance, making it the perfect solution for enterprise-level, multi-team, multi-project environments.

Multi-Team Management

For enterprise organizations managing multiple games and large teams, Meshy enables you to create and manage multiple team workspaces with centralized control and oversight.

Shared Team Workspace

Shared credits and a unified asset library keep your team in sync and enable seamless collaboration throughout the workflow.

ISO27001, SOC2 Type II, & GDPR Certifications

Meshy delivers enterprise-grade security across every layer of our platform. Our platform is certified under SOC2 Type II, ISO27001, and GDPR

Single Sign-On (SSO)

Meshy Enterprise supports SSO via SAML, enabling secure, centralized login for large teams using identity providers like Okta, Google Workspace, or Microsoft Entra.

Increased Data Privacy

Enterprise customer data is stored in a separate, secure database to ensure privacy and meet organizational compliance needs.

Dedicated Account Support

Dedicated account executives and solutions engineers are here to support your enterprise setup and assist with any general inquiries promptly.

Forever Asset Retention

Once generated, your models are always available for download—anytime you need them.

Centralized Billing

All team members share a single billing account, making it easier for IT and finance teams to manage payments and invoices.

Showcase

User Stories

Incredible text to 3D and more! No limits to your imagination. If you have a creative mind, you can indulge yourself in creating everything that comes to mind, in a 3D version. The latest update has brought further improvements, furthermore in just 60 seconds 8 results of what we are going to create are generated. Of these, we can request an upscale or rather a refinement of the result. There are 3 3D generation possibilities which are as follows: from text, from image and the fantastic retexture function. I am one of the lucky winners of the retexture contest which gave away color stickers printed with a 3D printer! It is possible to export your creation in video format and in the glb format exportable to 3D editing software. Rating: 5 stars deserved!!
Max Casu
AI Creator
The level of texture and ease of the UI are incredible and unmatched. I use way too many 3D tools and this sits at the top of my workflow. Thanks Meshy!
Tom Blake
Digital Artist
My current go-to for AI 3D model generation tool. The latest Meshy 4 generations have been a huge leap in terms of quality for both text and image to 3D. Plus I've already got lots of value out of the easy biped/quadruped rigging and walking animation option. Also, it's great to see the texturing improvements and the ability to retexture or fix textured sections (via the text-to-3d approach).
Jon Draper
AI Animator & Developer
Who would have said that at some point we could use #AI to #texture our #3D models? @MeshyAI can really texture anything. From models you import to anything you create in other tools (without any UV mapping needed 🤯).
Gabriele Romagnoli
3D Artist
With @MeshyAI you can generate your textures in ai, but what makes this a winner is it's amazing easy-to-use Interface, and the GLB maps you can use with #b3d #blender - #3D #artists, check this tool to texture your #models! (not sponsored).
Pierre Schiller
3D Artist
It's really blowing my mind how far we've come with text-to-3D. It was only a few months ago we were getting very unimpressive results from tools like Shap-E. Now I can make full on objects that are borderline game ready.
Matt Wolfe
AI Creator
2025 is the year 3D AI takes over! Meshy AI lets you turn a single image into high-quality 3D model. Then, you can choose any angle and bring it to life with an AI video generator. 3D AI is the future of content creation.
el.cine
AI Creator
I absolutely love this deep-sea steel city that blends surrealism and steampunk styles. It’s incredibly exciting to see a world from my imagination gradually take shape in the game! @MeshyAI
DarkTree Game Studio
Game Developer
Meshy.ai is getting so much better. Last time I tried it, I was happy to get a blob in roughly the right shape. Now it seems capable of producing some really intricate forms while adhering to the prompt quite well.
Kiaran Ritchie
Principle Developer at Unreal Engine
